original: This Kiha-brand melee weapon resembles an old-time arming sword, though the blade is made of ultra-tough modern materials, and covered in a series of small ports and recessed power amps. With a flip of a button, the blade coats itself in crackling electricity. When the blade strikes a shielded opponent, not only does it do damage, but it leeches power from the target’s shield belt and creates a secondary kinetic barrier around the user.
